summary: Multiple vehicles, including vans and sedans, navigate through an intersection under overcast skies. Traffic flows smoothly with no apparent incidents or disruptions.

events_timeline.event: Van_1 drives across the intersection while van_2 follows closely behind.
Sedan_1 crosses the intersection ahead of van_1.
Van_3 enters the frame from the right side and proceeds across the intersection.

uncertainties: The identity of sedan_2 is unclear due to its obscured visibility.

risk_assessment.why: All vehicles are moving normally without any collisions or disruptions.
